title: ononis vulgaris proles antiquorum
intro: Ononis vulgaris proles antiquorum, also known as the Restharrow or Old Man's Foot, is a perennial plant species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The health benefits of Ononis vulgaris proles antiquorum include treating wounds, eczema, and other skin conditions, as well as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, and its roots can be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
